---
title: "Collection Report"
author: "Lainie Boldus"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output: html_document
params:
  csv_overview: '/Users/lainieboldus/Desktop/Crombie Lab/wnc_data25:26/full6collections.csv'
  csv_full:     '/Users/lainieboldus/Desktop/Crombie Lab/wnc_data25:26/full6collections.csv'
  write_map_html: true
  map_html_file: "index.html"
  r_mean_path: "/Users/lainieboldus/Desktop/Crombie Lab/fl_climate/data/processed/prism_mean_tmean_20241101_20250201.tif"
  r_ppt_path:  "/Users/lainieboldus/Desktop/Crombie Lab/fl_climate/data/processed/prism_mean_ppt_20241101_20250201.tif"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = FALSE)
```

## Wild Collection Project Overview

```{r project overview, echo=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(janitor)
library(DT)
library(tibble)

raw_in <- readr::read_csv(params$csv_overview, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ if (is.character(.x)) na_if(trimws(.x), "") else .x))

pick_col <- function(dat, candidates) {
  hit <- intersect(candidates, names(dat))
  if (length(hit) == 0) return(list(name = NA_character_, values = rep(NA, nrow(dat))))
  list(name = hit[1], values = dat[[hit[1]]])
}

safe_parse_date <- function(x) {
  if (inherits(x, "Date"))   return(x)
  if (inherits(x, "POSIXt")) return(as_date(x))
  x <- as.character(x)
  x[is.na(x) | x %in% c("", "NA", "NULL")] <- NA
  x[nchar(x) > 30] <- NA
  out <- rep(as.Date(NA), length(x))
  num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  is_excel <- !is.na(num) & num >= 20000 & num <= 60000
  out[is_excel] <- as.Date(num[is_excel], origin = "1899-12-30")
  is_unix_sec <- !is.na(num) & num >= 1e9 & num < 2e10
  out[is_unix_sec] <- as_date(as.POSIXct(num[is_unix_sec], origin = "1970-01-01", tz = "UTC"))
  is_unix_ms <- !is.na(num) & num >= 1e11 & num < 1e14
  out[is_unix_ms] <- as_date(as.POSIXct(num[is_unix_ms]/1000, origin = "1970-01-01", tz = "UTC"))
  todo <- which(is.na(out) & !is.na(x))
  if (length(todo) > 0) {
    parsed <- suppressWarnings(
      parse_date_time(
        x[todo],
        orders = c("Ymd","Y-m-d","mdy","dmy",
                   "Ymd HMS","Y-m-d H:M:S","mdy HMS","dmy HMS",
                   "b d Y","B d Y","b d, Y","B d, Y"),
        tz = "UTC"
      )
    )
    out[todo] <- as_date(parsed)
  }
  out
}

p_coll  <- pick_col(raw_in, c("collection_by","collector","collected_by","collectedby"))
p_isol  <- pick_col(raw_in, c("isolation_by","isolator","isolated_by"))
p_cdate <- pick_col(raw_in, c("date_time_original","datetimeoriginal",
                               "collection_date_utc","collection_date","collection_datetime_utc",
                               "date","collected_date","date_collected","sampling_date",
                               "sample_date","event_date","fulcrum_created_at","created_at"))
p_clab  <- pick_col(raw_in, c("c_label","collection_id","collection_label"))
p_spec  <- pick_col(raw_in, c("species_id","species"))

# Diagnostic: show which date column was matched (or none)
message("Date column matched: ",
        if (!is.na(p_cdate$name)) p_cdate$name else "NONE — check column names in CSV")
message("Available columns: ", paste(names(raw_in), collapse = ", "))

proj_like <- unique(c(
  intersect(c("project","project_name","easyfulcrum_project","projectid","project_id","project_code","project_title"),
            names(raw_in)),
  grep("(proj|project)", names(raw_in), value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)
))

proj_tally <- if (length(proj_like)) {
  sapply(proj_like, function(nm) sum(!is.na(raw_in[[nm]]) & raw_in[[nm]] != ""), USE.NAMES = TRUE)
} else integer(0)

chosen_proj_col <- if (length(proj_tally)) names(sort(proj_tally, decreasing = TRUE))[1] else NA_character_

dat <- tibble(
  project             = if (!is.na(chosen_proj_col)) as.character(raw_in[[chosen_proj_col]]) else NA_character_,
  collection_by       = p_coll$values,
  isolation_by        = p_isol$values,
  collection_date_utc = safe_parse_date(p_cdate$values),
  c_label             = p_clab$values,
  species_id          = p_spec$values
)

sf <- lubridate::stamp("Tuesday, September 30, 1997")

personnel_projects <- dat %>%
  distinct(project) %>%
  filter(!is.na(project)) %>%
  pull() %>%
  data.frame()

personnel_collectors <- dat %>%
  distinct(collection_by) %>%
  filter(!is.na(collection_by)) %>%
  pull() %>%
  data.frame()

personnel_isolators <- dat %>%
  distinct(isolation_by) %>%
  filter(!is.na(isolation_by)) %>%
  pull() %>%
  data.frame()

collection_dates <- dat %>%
  distinct(collection_date_utc) %>%
  filter(!is.na(collection_date_utc)) %>%
  arrange(collection_date_utc) %>%
  pull(collection_date_utc) %>%
  sf() %>%
  data.frame()

DT::datatable(personnel_projects, colnames = "Collection project names:", rownames = FALSE,
              options = list(dom = "t", ordering = FALSE))
DT::datatable(personnel_collectors, colnames = "Participants in collection:", rownames = FALSE,
              options = list(dom = "t"))
DT::datatable(personnel_isolators, colnames = "Participants in strain isolation:", rownames = FALSE,
              options = list(dom = "t"))
DT::datatable(collection_dates, colnames = "Dates of collection:", rownames = FALSE,
              options = list(dom = "t"))
```

## Wild Collections Data Tables

```{r collection data tables, echo=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(janitor)
library(DT)

raw <- readr::read_csv(params$csv_overview, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

df_clean <- raw %>%
  mutate(
    c_label         = if ("c_label"         %in% names(.)) c_label         else NA_character_,
    species_id      = if ("species_id"      %in% names(.)) species_id      else NA_character_,
    worms_on_sample = if ("worms_on_sample" %in% names(.)) worms_on_sample else NA_character_
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    species_id      = na_if(trimws(as.character(species_id)), ""),
    worms_on_sample = na_if(trimws(as.character(worms_on_sample)), ""),
    species_id      = ifelse(str_to_lower(species_id)      %in% c("na","n/a"), NA, species_id),
    worms_on_sample = ifelse(str_to_lower(worms_on_sample) %in% c("na","n/a"), NA, worms_on_sample),
    species_norm   = species_id      |> str_squish() |> str_to_lower(),
    worms_norm_raw = worms_on_sample |> str_squish() |> str_to_lower(),
    worms_norm = case_when(
      worms_norm_raw %in% c("yes","y","true","present")           ~ "Yes",
      worms_norm_raw %in% c("tracks","track","trace","traces")    ~ "Tracks",
      worms_norm_raw %in% c("no","n","false","absent")            ~ "No",
      TRUE                                                         ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

collection_counts_1 <- df_clean %>%
  filter(!is.na(c_label)) %>%
  mutate(
    class = case_when(
      !is.na(species_norm) & worms_norm == "Yes" & str_detect(species_norm, "elegans")           ~ "C. elegans",
      !is.na(species_norm) & worms_norm == "Yes" & str_detect(species_norm, "tropicalis")        ~ "C. tropicalis",
      !is.na(species_norm) & worms_norm == "Yes" & str_detect(species_norm, "briggsae")          ~ "C. briggsae",
      !is.na(species_norm) & worms_norm == "Yes" & str_detect(species_norm, "^caenorhabditis")   ~ "other-Caenorhabditis",
      !is.na(species_norm) & worms_norm == "Yes" & !str_detect(species_norm, "^caenorhabditis")  ~ "non-Caenorhabditis",
      is.na(species_norm)  & worms_norm %in% c("Yes","Tracks")                                   ~ "unknown nematode",
      is.na(species_norm)  & worms_norm == "No"                                                  ~ "no nematode",
      TRUE                                                                                        ~ "unknown/NA"
    ),
    class = factor(
      class,
      levels = c(
        "C. elegans","C. tropicalis","C. briggsae",
        "other-Caenorhabditis","non-Caenorhabditis",
        "unknown nematode","no nematode","unknown/NA"
      )
    )
  )

collection_distinct <- dplyr::n_distinct(collection_counts_1$c_label)
message("Total number of distinct collections: ", collection_distinct)

collection_worms_on_sample <- collection_counts_1 %>%
  distinct(c_label, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  count(worms_norm, name = "n") %>%
  mutate(
    worms_on_sample = ifelse(is.na(worms_norm), "unknown/NA", worms_norm),
    worms_on_sample = factor(worms_on_sample, levels = c("Yes","Tracks","No","unknown/NA"))
  ) %>%
  select(worms_on_sample, n)

collection_species_id <- collection_counts_1 %>%
  distinct(c_label, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  count(class, name = "n")

DT::datatable(
  collection_worms_on_sample,
  colnames = c("worms on sample", "number of collections"),
  rownames = FALSE,
  filter   = "none",
  options  = list(dom = "t")
)

DT::datatable(
  collection_species_id,
  colnames = c("collection class", "number of collections"),
  rownames = FALSE,
  filter   = "none",
  options  = list(dom = "t")
)
```

## All Wild Collections Table

```{r all collections table, echo=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(janitor)
library(DT)

df_raw <- readr::read_csv(params$csv_full, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

df <- df_raw %>%
  rename_with(~ "collection_by",
              any_of(c("collected_by", "collection_by"))) %>%
  rename_with(~ "proc_ambient_temperature",
              any_of(c("ambient_temperature", "proc_ambient_temperature"))) %>%
  rename_with(~ "proc_substrate_temperature",
              any_of(c("substrate_temperature", "proc_substrate_temperature"))) %>%
  rename_with(~ "collection_altitude",
              any_of(c("gpsaltitude", "gps_altitude", "collection_altitude")))

cols_wanted <- c(
  "c_label","s_label","species_id",
  "proc_ambient_temperature","ambient_humidity",
  "proc_substrate_temperature","collection_altitude",
  "substrate","landscape","collection_by"
)

collections_df <- df %>%
  select(any_of(cols_wanted))

DT::datatable(
  collections_df,
  rownames = FALSE,
  colnames = c(
    "C-label","S-label","SpeciesID",
    "AmbientTemp (°C)","AmbientHumidity (%)",
    "SubstrateTemp (°C)","Altitude (m)",
    "Substrate","Landscape","CollectedBy"
  )[seq_len(ncol(collections_df))],
  filter  = "none",
  options = list(dom = "ftrp", scrollX = TRUE)
)
```

## Wild Collections Plots

```{r wild collections plots, echo=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(janitor)
library(cowplot)
library(ggplot2)

df_raw <- readr::read_csv(params$csv_full, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

# Identify project column before mutate
project_candidates <- intersect(
  c("project","project_name","easyfulcrum_project","project_id","project_code","project_title"),
  names(df_raw)
)
project_col <- if (length(project_candidates)) project_candidates[1] else NA_character_

df <- df_raw %>%
  mutate(project = if (!is.na(project_col)) as.character(.data[[project_col]]) else NA_character_) %>%
  rename_with(~ "collection_altitude",
              any_of(c("gpsaltitude", "gps_altitude", "collection_altitude"))) %>%
  rename_with(~ "ambient_temperature",
              any_of(c("ambient_temperature", "proc_ambient_temperature"))) %>%
  rename_with(~ "substrate_temperature",
              any_of(c("substrate_temperature", "proc_substrate_temperature")))

stat_df <- df %>%
  distinct(project, c_label, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  select(any_of(c(
    "project","c_label","s_label","species_id",
    "ambient_temperature","ambient_humidity","substrate_temperature","collection_altitude"
  ))) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = any_of(c("ambient_temperature","ambient_humidity","substrate_temperature","collection_altitude")),
    names_to  = "env_par",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(value = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(value)))

mk_box <- function(.data, par, ylab, show_legend = FALSE) {
  plot_data <- .data %>% filter(env_par == par)
  if (nrow(plot_data) == 0 || all(is.na(plot_data$value))) {
    message("No data available for: ", par)
    return(ggplot() + labs(title = paste("No data:", par)) + theme_bw())
  }
  ggplot(data = plot_data) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(x = env_par, y = value), outlier.color = NA) +
    geom_jitter(aes(x = env_par, y = value, shape = project), size = 1.5, width = 0.25) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(x = "", y = ylab) +
    theme(
      axis.title      = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold",   color = "black"),
      axis.text       = element_text(size = 9,                  color = "black"),
      axis.text.x     = element_text(size = 9, face = "italic", color = "black"),
      legend.position = if (show_legend) "right" else "none"
    )
}

p_atemp <- mk_box(stat_df, "ambient_temperature",  "Ambient temperature (°C)",  show_legend = TRUE)
legend  <- cowplot::get_legend(p_atemp)
p_atemp <- p_atemp + theme(legend.position = "none")
p_stemp <- mk_box(stat_df, "substrate_temperature", "Substrate temperature (°C)")
p_ahum  <- mk_box(stat_df, "ambient_humidity",      "Ambient humidity (%)")
p_elev  <- mk_box(stat_df, "collection_altitude",   "Elevation (m)")

plots <- cowplot::plot_grid(p_atemp, p_stemp, p_ahum, p_elev, ncol = 2, align = "hv", axis = "l")
cowplot::plot_grid(plots, legend, ncol = 2, rel_widths = c(1, 0.23))
```

## Wild Collections Map

```{r collections map, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(glue)
library(leaflet)
library(stringr)
library(terra)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(tigris)
library(sf)

log_step <- function(msg) message(format(Sys.time(), "[%H:%M:%S] "), msg)

# -----------------------------
# 0) Load site CSVs
# Update these paths as new collection trips are added
# -----------------------------
csv_paths <- c(
  '/Users/lainieboldus/Desktop/Crombie Lab/202411_FLTECH/data/processed/joined_with_gps_202411fltech.csv',
  '/Users/lainieboldus/Desktop/Crombie Lab/202412_TurkeyCreek/data/processed/joined_with_gps_202412TCS.csv',
  '/Users/lainieboldus/Desktop/Crombie Lab/202502_FLTECH/data/processed/joined_with_gps_202502fltech.csv',
  '/Users/lainieboldus/Desktop/Crombie Lab/wnc_data25:26/202511_TCS/data/processed/tcs1125_withgps.csv',
  '/Users/lainieboldus/Desktop/Crombie Lab/wnc_data25:26/202601_FLTECH/data/processed/202601fltech_joinedwithgps.csv',
  '/Users/lainieboldus/Desktop/Crombie Lab/wnc_data25:26/202602_MV/data/processed/202602mv_joinedwithgps.csv'
)

missing <- csv_paths[!file.exists(csv_paths)]
if (length(missing)) stop("Missing CSV file(s):\n", paste(missing, collapse = "\n"))

df_raw <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(csv_paths, function(p) {
  x <- read.csv(p, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  x$source_file <- basename(p)
  x
}))

# -----------------------------
# 1) Load climate rasters
# -----------------------------
stopifnot(file.exists(params$r_mean_path), file.exists(params$r_ppt_path))
r_mean <- terra::rast(params$r_mean_path)
r_ppt  <- terra::rast(params$r_ppt_path)

# -----------------------------
# 2) Download & prepare LULC raster
# -----------------------------
log_step("Downloading ESA WorldCover tiles for Florida...")
tiles <- c(
  "https://esa-worldcover.s3.amazonaws.com/v200/2021/map/ESA_WorldCover_10m_2021_v200_N27W084_Map.tif",
  "https://esa-worldcover.s3.amazonaws.com/v200/2021/map/ESA_WorldCover_10m_2021_v200_N27W081_Map.tif",
  "https://esa-worldcover.s3.amazonaws.com/v200/2021/map/ESA_WorldCover_10m_2021_v200_N24W081_Map.tif",
  "https://esa-worldcover.s3.amazonaws.com/v200/2021/map/ESA_WorldCover_10m_2021_v200_N24W084_Map.tif",
  "https://esa-worldcover.s3.amazonaws.com/v200/2021/map/ESA_WorldCover_10m_2021_v200_N30W087_Map.tif",
  "https://esa-worldcover.s3.amazonaws.com/v200/2021/map/ESA_WorldCover_10m_2021_v200_N30W084_Map.tif",
  "https://esa-worldcover.s3.amazonaws.com/v200/2021/map/ESA_WorldCover_10m_2021_v200_N30W081_Map.tif"
)

tmp_dir    <- tempdir()
tile_files <- c()
for (i in seq_along(tiles)) {
  fname <- file.path(tmp_dir, basename(tiles[i]))
  if (!file.exists(fname)) {
    log_step(sprintf("  Tile %d/%d: downloading...", i, length(tiles)))
    tryCatch(
      download.file(tiles[i], fname, mode = "wb", quiet = TRUE),
      error = function(e) log_step(paste("  WARNING - Failed:", e$message))
    )
  } else {
    log_step(sprintf("  Tile %d/%d: cached", i, length(tiles)))
  }
  if (file.exists(fname)) tile_files <- c(tile_files, fname)
}

# Florida boundary for clipping
florida <- tigris::states(cb = TRUE, resolution = "5m") %>%
  dplyr::filter(NAME == "Florida") %>%
  sf::st_transform(4326)

fl_vect <- terra::vect(florida)
fl_ext  <- terra::ext(fl_vect)

# Crop each tile to Florida extent individually, then mosaic
# (avoids terra VRT materialization errors with multi-tile virtual rasters)
log_step("Cropping tiles to Florida extent...")
tile_rasts <- lapply(tile_files, function(f) {
  r <- terra::rast(f)
  tryCatch(terra::crop(r, fl_ext), error = function(e) {
    log_step(paste("  WARNING - Could not crop tile:", basename(f), "-", e$message))
    NULL
  })
})
tile_rasts <- Filter(Negate(is.null), tile_rasts)
if (length(tile_rasts) == 0) stop("No tiles could be cropped to Florida extent.")

log_step(sprintf("  Mosaicking %d cropped tiles...", length(tile_rasts)))
fl_crop <- if (length(tile_rasts) == 1) {
  tile_rasts[[1]]
} else {
  do.call(terra::mosaic, c(tile_rasts, list(fun = "first")))
}
fl_mask <- terra::mask(fl_crop, fl_vect)

log_step("Aggregating raster for web display (~300 m)...")
fl_agg <- terra::aggregate(fl_mask, fact = 30, fun = "modal")
fl_agg <- terra::project(fl_agg, "EPSG:4326")
log_step("  LULC raster ready")

# ESA class colours
esa_classes <- data.frame(
  value = c(10,           20,           30,            40,           50,
            60,                         70,            80,
            90,                         95,            100),
  label = c("Tree Cover", "Shrubland",  "Grassland",   "Cropland",   "Built-up",
            "Bare / Sparse Veg",        "Snow and Ice","Permanent Water",
            "Herbaceous Wetland",       "Mangroves",   "Moss and Lichen"),
  color = c("#006400",    "#FFBB22",    "#FFFF4C",     "#F096FF",    "#FA0000",
            "#B4B4B4",                  "#F0F0F0",     "#0064C8",
            "#0096A0",                  "#00CF75",     "#FAE6A0")
)

present_vals <- sort(unique(terra::values(fl_agg, na.rm = TRUE)))
pal_lulc_df  <- esa_classes[esa_classes$value %in% present_vals, ]
pal_lulc     <- leaflet::colorFactor(
  palette  = pal_lulc_df$color,
  levels   = pal_lulc_df$value,
  na.color = "transparent"
)

# -----------------------------
# 3) Prep site data
# -----------------------------
df <- df_raw %>%
  rename(
    collection_longitude = GPSLongitude,
    collection_latitude  = GPSLatitude,
    collection_altitude  = GPSAltitude,
    collection_by        = collected_by,
    collection_location  = project
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    collection_latitude  = as.numeric(collection_latitude),
    collection_longitude = as.numeric(collection_longitude)
  ) %>%
  group_by(c_label) %>%
  mutate(
    # black    = no organism (proliferating == 0)
    # lightgray = organism present, species unknown
    # red      = species ID confirmed
    color = case_when(
      any(proliferating == 1 & !is.na(species_id) &
            species_id != "" & str_to_lower(species_id) != "n/a", na.rm = TRUE) ~ "red",
      any(proliferating == 1, na.rm = TRUE)                                      ~ "lightgray",
      TRUE                                                                        ~ "black"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

if (!"substrate" %in% names(df)) df$substrate <- NA_character_

# Collapse to one row per c_label
sites <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(collection_longitude), !is.na(collection_latitude)) %>%
  mutate(substrate = if_else(is.na(substrate), "", substrate)) %>%
  group_by(c_label) %>%
  summarise(
    collection_longitude = mean(collection_longitude, na.rm = TRUE),
    collection_latitude  = mean(collection_latitude,  na.rm = TRUE),
    collection_altitude  = first(collection_altitude),
    collection_by        = first(collection_by),
    collection_location  = first(collection_location),
    source_file          = first(source_file),
    substrate            = first(substrate),
    color                = first(color),
    species_hits = {
      ids <- unique(species_id[
        !is.na(species_id) & species_id != "" & str_to_lower(species_id) != "n/a"
      ])
      if (length(ids) > 0) paste(paste0("<i>", ids, "</i>"), collapse = ", ") else
        if (first(color) == "lightgray") "unknown" else "none"
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  )

if (nrow(sites) == 0) stop("No rows to map.")

# -----------------------------
# 4) Climate raster palettes
# -----------------------------
mm_t  <- terra::minmax(r_mean)
pal_t <- leaflet::colorNumeric("viridis", c(mm_t[1,1], mm_t[2,1]), na.color = "transparent")

mm_p  <- terra::minmax(r_ppt)
pal_p <- leaflet::colorNumeric("viridis", c(mm_p[1,1], mm_p[2,1]), na.color = "transparent")

# -----------------------------
# 5) Icons + popups
# -----------------------------
site_icons <- leaflet::awesomeIcons(
  icon        = "circle",
  library     = "fa",
  markerColor = sites$color,
  iconColor   = "white"
)

site_popups <- glue::glue_data(
  sites,
  "<h2>{c_label}</h2><hr />
   <strong>Source file:</strong> {source_file}<br />
   <strong>Collected by:</strong> {collection_by}<br />
   <strong>Lat, Lon:</strong> {format(round(collection_latitude,6),nsmall=6)}, {format(round(collection_longitude,6),nsmall=6)}<br />
   <strong>Altitude (m):</strong> {collection_altitude}<br />
   <strong>Location:</strong> {collection_location}<br />
   <strong>Substrate:</strong> {substrate}<br />
   <strong>Species ID:</strong> {species_hits}"
)

# -----------------------------
# 6) Build leaflet map
# -----------------------------
lng1 <- min(sites$collection_longitude, na.rm = TRUE)
lat1 <- min(sites$collection_latitude,  na.rm = TRUE)
lng2 <- max(sites$collection_longitude, na.rm = TRUE)
lat2 <- max(sites$collection_latitude,  na.rm = TRUE)

log_step("Building leaflet map...")

m <- leaflet(options = leafletOptions(zoomControl = TRUE)) %>%
  addProviderTiles("OpenStreetMap.Mapnik", group = "OSM (Color)") %>%
  # Land cover layer
  addRasterImage(
    fl_agg,
    colors  = pal_lulc,
    opacity = 0.65,
    group   = "Land Cover (ESA)"
  ) %>%
  # Climate layers
  addRasterImage(r_mean, colors = pal_t, opacity = 0.6, group = "Mean Temperature") %>%
  addRasterImage(r_ppt,  colors = pal_p, opacity = 0.6, group = "Mean Precipitation") %>%
  # Site markers
  addCircleMarkers(
    data        = sites,
    lng         = ~collection_longitude,
    lat         = ~collection_latitude,
    radius      = 4,
    stroke      = FALSE,
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    group       = "Sites (Circles)"
  ) %>%
  addAwesomeMarkers(
    data         = sites,
    lng          = ~collection_longitude,
    lat          = ~collection_latitude,
    icon         = site_icons,
    popup        = site_popups,
    popupOptions = popupOptions(maxWidth = 500),
    group        = "Sites (Popups)"
  ) %>%
  # Layer controls
  addLayersControl(
    baseGroups    = "OSM (Color)",
    overlayGroups = c("Land Cover (ESA)", "Mean Temperature",
                      "Mean Precipitation", "Sites (Popups)", "Sites (Circles)"),
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  # Legends
  addLegend(
    position = "bottomleft",
    colors   = pal_lulc_df$color,
    labels   = pal_lulc_df$label,
    title    = "Land Cover (ESA 2021)",
    opacity  = 0.9,
    layerId  = "legend_lulc"
  ) %>%
  addLegend(
    pal     = pal_t,
    values  = c(mm_t[1,1], mm_t[2,1]),
    title   = "Mean Temp (°C)",
    opacity = 0.9,
    layerId = "legend_tmean"
  ) %>%
  addLegend(
    pal     = pal_p,
    values  = c(mm_p[1,1], mm_p[2,1]),
    title   = "Mean Precip (mm/day)",
    opacity = 0.9,
    layerId = "legend_ppt"
  ) %>%
  fitBounds(lng1, lat1, lng2, lat2) %>%
  # JS: toggle legends with their layers; precip off by default
  onRender("
    function(el, x) {
      var map = this;
      function setLegend(id, show) {
        var node = el.querySelector('#' + id);
        if (node) node.style.display = show ? '' : 'none';
      }
      // Hide precip layer and legend by default
      setLegend('legend_ppt', false);
      map.eachLayer(function(lyr) {
        if (lyr && lyr.options && lyr.options.group === 'Mean Precipitation')
          map.removeLayer(lyr);
      });
      map.on('overlayadd', function(e) {
        if (e.name === 'Land Cover (ESA)')   setLegend('legend_lulc',  true);
        if (e.name === 'Mean Temperature')   setLegend('legend_tmean', true);
        if (e.name === 'Mean Precipitation') setLegend('legend_ppt',   true);
      });
      map.on('overlayremove', function(e) {
        if (e.name === 'Land Cover (ESA)')   setLegend('legend_lulc',  false);
        if (e.name === 'Mean Temperature')   setLegend('legend_tmean', false);
        if (e.name === 'Mean Precipitation') setLegend('legend_ppt',   false);
      });
    }
  ")

m
```
